title: ilex perado subsp. azorica
intro: Ilex perado subsp. azorica, also known as the Canarian Holly or Azores Holly, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Ilex perado tree, native to the Canary Islands. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ilex perado subsp. azorica include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
